# STRAT.048 ? Interest-Based Relational (IBR)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** conflict_resolution
**Domain:** CONFLICT_RESOLUTION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Separate relationship from problem; soft on people, hard on problem; focus on interests; generate options; objective criteria

## Application
Maintain relationship; distinguish substance from emotion; explore underlying interests; brainstorm solutions; use objective standards

## Key Values
- Relationship preservation
- Interest focus
- Creative options
- Objective criteria
- Soft/hard balance

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, conflict_resolution

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
